master_plan.worker_prompt: Fix broken decision paths in postflop code. Add SPR awareness and opponent bet-size profiling.

reviewer_feedback: Previous critic scored 5/10 citing stale wider-preflop+bigger-sizing pattern. Worker retry added: (1) Pot-size-aware postflop logic with SPR thresholds, (2) Opponent bet-size profiling in postflop.py, (3) Reduced tier 3-4 preflop sizing from 3.5x to 2.5x BB. Fixed broken decision paths (0%→87% decision tests). Postflop decision quality should now better support wider preflop ranges.
